onbBiometricNotEnrolledError.en: Biometrics aren't set up on this device. Add a fingerprint or face in your phone's settings, then try again.
onbBiometricNotEnrolledError.desc: Error shown when the user picks biometric lock but no fingerprint/face is enrolled on the device.

onbBiometricConfirmReason.desc: Prompt reason shown by the OS biometric dialog while enabling biometric app lock during onboarding.

onbBiometricSetupFailed.desc: Error shown when the biometric authentication attempt throws a platform exception during onboarding setup.

onbSetupFailed.desc: Error shown when saving the profile / finishing onboarding fails.

onbWelcomeEyebrow.desc: Uppercase eyebrow label above the welcome headline on the first onboarding screen.

onbWelcomeHeadline.desc: Large serif headline on the welcome onboarding screen. Keep the line break.

onbWelcomePillOnDeviceSub.desc: Subtitle of the '100% on-device' feature pill on the welcome screen. Keep the line break.

onbWelcomePillNoAccountTitle.desc: Uppercase title of the no-account feature pill on the welcome screen.

onbWelcomePillNoAccountSub.desc: Subtitle of the no-account feature pill on the welcome screen. Keep the line break.

onbWelcomePillZeroTrackingTitle.desc: Uppercase title of the zero-tracking feature pill on the welcome screen.

onbWelcomePillZeroTrackingSub.desc: Subtitle of the zero-tracking feature pill on the welcome screen. Keep the line break.

onbWelcomeBeginButton.desc: Primary call-to-action button on the welcome onboarding screen.

onbWelcomeDisclaimer.en: Not medical advice — a companion, not a clinician.
onbWelcomeDisclaimer.desc: Small disclaimer text at the bottom of the welcome onboarding screen.

onbQuitDateLabel.desc: Label on the date tile when the user has chosen a future quit date (countdown mode).

onbTimeOfDayLabel.desc: Label on the time tile in the sober-date onboarding step.

onbDaysUntilDayOneLabel.desc: Trailing label after the countdown number when a future quit date is selected, e.g. '12 days until day one'.

onbSecurityPinRecoveryWarning.en: If you forget your PIN, your data cannot be recovered without a backup. Set up a backup later in Profile → Backup.
onbSecurityPinRecoveryWarning.desc: Data-recovery warning shown when the user selects PIN lock during onboarding.

onbSecurityBiometricRecoveryWarning.en: If you lose biometric access (factory reset, device change, etc.), your data cannot be recovered without a backup. Set one up in Profile → Backup.
onbSecurityBiometricRecoveryWarning.desc: Data-recovery warning shown when the user selects biometric lock during onboarding.

onbFinishHeadlineWithName.desc: Finish-step headline when the user entered a name. Keep the line break.

onbFinishHeadline.desc: Finish-step headline when no name was entered. Keep the line break.

onbFinishEyebrowCountdown.desc: Uppercase eyebrow on the finish step when a future quit date is set, counting down to day one.

onbFinishEyebrowContinuing.desc: Uppercase eyebrow on the finish step when the user already has sober days logged.

onbFinishEyebrowDayOne.desc: Uppercase eyebrow on the finish step when the journey starts today (day one).

onbFinishBodyFuture.en: Your quit date is set. We'll count down with you — and the moment it arrives, day one begins.
onbFinishBodyFuture.desc: Finish-step subtitle shown when the user picked a future quit date.
